---
title: "Trajectory"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Trajectory}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(ncfigR)
embedding <- readr::read_tsv(system.file("extdata/embedding.tsv", package = "ncfigR"))
trajectory <- readr::read_tsv(system.file("extdata/trajectory.tsv", package = "ncfigR"))
p1 <- plot_embedding_panel(embedding, color_col = "group")
p2 <- plot_trajectory_trend(trajectory, group_col = "state")
fig <- compose_nc_figure(list(p1, p2), ncol = 2, title = "Trajectory")
```
